headline: Transcript: Who’s benefiting from Trump’s presidency?
summary: Marc Filippino talks to Joe Miller, Alex Rogers and Myles McCormick
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Swamp Notes podcast episode: ‘Who’s benefiting from Trump’s presidency?’

Marc FilippinoDuring his first term, US President Donald Trump once tweeted out that he didn’t like bitcoin. He said cryptocurrencies are, quote, based on thin air, but this time around the president has changed.

Donald Trump voice clipThe United States will be the crypto capital of the planet and the bitcoin superpower of the world, and we’ll get it done.

Marc FilippinoTrump now has a lot of friends since his most recent election, and sectors like crypto have been very good to the president’s family since he changed his tune. But a new FT investigation shed some light on just how much the president’s family and his donors have benefited from their friendship.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

This is Swamp Notes, the weekly podcast from the Financial Times, where we talk about all the things happening in US politics, finance and the economy. I’m Marc Filippino, and this week we’re asking: wh
